name: Go For It Sports
about: Go For It Sports Dome is a large indoor sports facility in Yorkville, Illinois, spanning 40,000 square feet with both indoor and outdoor spaces. It features a multi-use indoor track, turf areas, and is equipped with Chad Johansen Golf Simulators, catering to a diverse range of athletic and recreational activities. The venue operates with flexible hours, offering space for rentals, parties, events, and various programs for different age groups and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Versatile facility with both golf simulators and open turf spaces for various activities
Flexible booking system for individuals and groups
Host to special events and team parties, creating a social atmosphere
Partnership with Chad Johansen Golf Simulators for quality technology

simulator_hardware.notes: Partnership with Chad Johansen Golf Simulators for specific equipment details

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies. It is recommended to contact Go For It Sports directly for details on club availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not have information on outside food and drink policies. Contact the venue for specific details on bringing refreshments for your session or event.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulators?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the duration for an 18-hole round. Please contact the venue to inquire about typical session times and simulator booking policies.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Go For It Sports Dome is kid-friendly. The venue offers programs specifically for preschoolers, camps, and special needs sports, in addition to general sports activities suitable for children.
